_comment: Brand → Motion workspace/report ID mapping for motion-pp-cli. Built 2026-06-07 from existing Top Spenders Analysis files. Update by either (a) re-running motion-pp-cli brands + looking up the report-id in Motion's UI, or (b) parsing a new Top Spenders Analysis markdown file for the report URL. After updating, run motion-top-spenders skill — no restart needed.

missing_report_ids.FitSleeps: INACTIVE. No current Motion report. Skip unless reactivated.

how_to_find_a_new_report_id: Open Motion, navigate to the brand's TopAdsReport. Copy the URL — it ends in /top/<REPORT_ID>. The workspace_id is in the URL too: /organization/<org>/<workspace>/top/<report>.
